use_cases: Hero section typography with interactive cursor-following glow effect
Landing page headlines with customizable text illumination
Brand showcase presentations with ambient lighting effects
Creative portfolio sections with dynamic text shadows
Dark-themed interface text with depth and focus cues
ai_summary: An interactive text component that renders typography with a glowing shadow effect that follows the mouse cursor. Features customizable colors, fonts, gradient glow options, and blur intensity. Designed for dark backgrounds, it creates an ambient lighting effect around text that responds to user interaction, making it ideal for hero sections and creative showcases.
